title: dactylorhiza elatior
intro: Dactylorhiza elatior, also known as the tall marsh orchid, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza elatior include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help manage respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Dactylorhiza elatior can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications and allergies.
